source: Andrada Mining Uis tin operations — modeled from FY2026 production (1,036 t contained Sn), investor deck ramp targets, and annual report cost structure.

assets.name: Uis tin & tantalum operations
assets.notes: Production in contained tin (tonnes). Revenue and AISC in USD/lb Sn (LME-style). FY2026 actual ~1,036 t; ramp toward 2.5× output over 36 months.

assets.notes: Petalite concentrate (t) — pre-feasibility stage; modeled staged ramp post-feasibility (50 ktpa target in company materials).
